authority: campaign brief ladder (Facet B: typed smallness, FX-E/FX-K) + Will's Facet-B GO (Facet-A acceptance message); rows in play: CL-2 (+ CL-7 evidence) ONLY
organ: I3b_typed_smallness_v1 (role=probe): classifies the POINT per (fixture, point, tau) — GENUINE_PROXIMITY (|TRUE| <= tau) / ROUTE_ARTIFACT (|TRUE| > tau >= |reading|) / NOT_SMALL / FLOOR_LIMITED (annex enclosure straddles tau at the p-cap; channel-floor vocabulary). The classical reading is the COMPARISON COLUMN (classical_reading_agrees recorded) so the route's lie is caught in both directions: manufactured smallness AND masked smallness. TRUE via the probe's own paths (lane account / certified enclosures); referee never called by the organ.

predictions.PB.1: probe verdict == referee verdict on EVERY rational-class triple (referee: eval_exact magnitude vs tau, exact in Q). Zero mismatches. Units: triples.
predictions.PB.2: both contrast arms present on battery: >= 1 ROUTE_ARTIFACT verdict AND >= 1 GENUINE_PROXIMITY with classical_reading_agrees == False (route-masked smallness). Units: triples.
predictions.PB.3: K1 route-pair structure, two-component: (a) the TRUE-side classification (GENUINE_PROXIMITY vs not) is ROUTE-INVARIANT across the pair at every shared (point, tau) — TRUE is the same function; (b) the pinned reading-side SPLIT reproduces: at RN(1/3), tau=2^-55, FXK1b (factored) reads exactly 0 — the route structurally cannot see RN(1/3) - 1/3 — giving ROUTE_ARTIFACT, while FXK1a (expanded) reads ~TRUE giving NOT_SMALL (the registered fingerprint; pinned in the expectations at dry-run). A draft PB.3 claiming full verdict equality was caught AT AUTHORING by the dry-run expectations and reworded pre-freeze — recorded, not silent. Units: (point, tau) pairs + the pinned split row.
predictions.PB.4: annex honesty: FXK3b (exact point through isqrt exactness) classifies GENUINE at both taus; FXK3a classifies GENUINE at tau=2^-40 (enclosure decides) and FLOOR_LIMITED at tau=2^-500 (cap straddle — CL-7's floor arm ON battery); referee (Arbiter-M magnitude with safety margin) agrees wherever it can decide; FLOOR_LIMITED where M also cannot decide = agreement per the channel-floor successor rule. Units: triples.
predictions.PB.5: determinism: battery byte-stable x2 (sha256 over records).

status_move_rules: CL-2 -> DEMONSTRATED iff PB.1 AND PB.2 AND PB.3 AND PB.4 PASS (arbiter-graded). CL-7: evidence APPENDED (floor arm on battery), status stays PARTIAL. Any PB-FAIL: chain preserved verbatim, STOP, route to Will.
